candidate: replace 32 sequential self-conditioning logits ttnn.slice calls with one ttnn.split
precision_and_order: BF16 arithmetic, matmul shapes, and ordered chunk reduction unchanged

canonical_traced_at48.interpretation: Warmed throughput regressed while the targeted component was unchanged. The lower candidate full-generation total came from variable first-block trace capture, not warmed execution.

decision: Do not add or enable DG_SELFCOND_SPLIT_LOGITS. Keep sequential logits slices.
limitations: Historical scope: this July-10 trace harness used RUN-first argmax because production Gumbel tracing had not landed yet. Current traced_denoise supports materialized/chunked Gumbel; do not treat this artifact as a current capability statement.
The candidate was removed after measurement, so no separate diffusion-decision campaign was needed beyond the identical three-block commit digest.
